name: Sunburst Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the crust ingredients: flour and powdered sugar. Add butter or margarine and mix at low speed until crumbly.
3. Press the mixture evenly into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan.
4. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. In a large bowl, combine the filling ingredients (sugar, flour, baking powder, and eggs). Blend well.
6. Stir in lemon juice. Pour the mixture over the warm crust.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 25 to 30 minutes, or until top is lightly golden brown. Allow to cool completely.
8. In a small bowl, mix powdered sugar with enough lemon juice for desired spreading consistency. Blend until smooth.
9. Spread frosting over cooled bars.
10. Cut into bars.
YIELD: 36 bars
